name: nexo-dashboard-pro
description: NEXO Dashboard PRO — ERP interno da NEXO Digital

scripts.build: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd .. && cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && rm -rf ../backend/public && cp -r dist ../backend/public
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && cd .. && ln -sf backend/node_modules node_modules && cd backend && node server.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
